Verify.pageSubtitle: Every pick we made, certified on blockchain. Don't trust us. Verify.
Verify.whatThisMeansText: This pick was recorded on a public blockchain the same day it was made. Nobody — not even us — can change the date or price after the fact. It's like a digital notary that seals each decision at the exact moment.
Verify.disclaimer: The blockchain certifies the pick date and price. Returns shown are not certified and are calculated in real time.
Verify.step1Desc: We select a stock with research and send it via WhatsApp.
Verify.step2Desc: The ticker, price and date are sealed in an immutable public record on Base (Ethereum L2).
Verify.step3Desc: You, an auditor, or a program can confirm we didn't change anything.
Verify.fomoText: These picks are weeks old. Subscribers received them the same day.
Verify.ctaSubtext: Includes daily picks via WhatsApp + full research
Verify.urgencyText: Current cycle: {current}/{target} picks delivered. Next one drops soon.
Verify.interimNote: Showing our first same-day certified picks. New picks are added daily.
Verify.transparencyText: We started making picks on March 4, 2026. The digital notary system was implemented weeks later. The first 27 picks were certified retroactively — you can verify the attestation date on the blockchain explorer. From pick #28 onward, each pick is automatically certified the same day.

Home.heroSubtitle: Every time someone buys a product from your companies, you earn money. They're called dividends. We pick the companies for you.

Home.problemTitle: You know you should be investing.
Home.problemSubtitle: But you don't know where to start.
Home.noiseDesc: Thousands of stocks, hundreds of opinions. You don't know which to buy.

Legal.ukBannerBody: This page may constitute a financial promotion under FCA Section 21 of FSMA 2000. The content has not been approved by an FCA-authorized person. Investing carries risk. Consult an FCA-authorized adviser before making investment decisions.
Legal.termsIntro: Welcome to Vectorial Data. By using our service, you agree to these terms.
Legal.termsServiceContent: Vectorial Data is a publishing service that provides educational and informational content about stocks and investing. We publish stock selections ("picks") with accompanying analysis. This is NOT personalized investment advice. We operate under the publisher's exclusion (Section 202(a)(11)(D) of the U.S. Investment Advisers Act), providing impersonal, general financial information.
Legal.termsEligibilityContent: You must be at least 18 years old to use this service. The service is not available to residents of countries subject to OFAC sanctions, including Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Syria, and the Crimea region.
Legal.termsSubscriptionContent: Subscriptions renew automatically each month via Stripe. You can cancel at any time from your Stripe subscription portal. There are no long-term contracts or cancellation fees.
Legal.termsLiabilityContent: Vectorial Data is not liable for any investment losses. All content is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. Investment decisions are solely yours. Past performance shown in our portfolio does not guarantee future results.
Legal.termsIpContent: All research content, written materials, and visual assets are the property of Vectorial Data and protected by copyright. You may share links to our content but may not reproduce, distribute, or resell our research.
Legal.termsGoverningContent: These terms are governed by the laws of Mexico. Any disputes will be resolved through arbitration.
Legal.termsContactContent: For questions about these terms, contact us at hola@vectorialdata.com.
Legal.privacyIntro: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains what data we collect and how we use it.
Legal.privacyCollectContent: Email address (for authentication and communication), payment information (processed by Stripe — we never store card data), phone number (for WhatsApp pick delivery), usage data (page visit analytics).
Legal.privacyUseContent: To deliver the service (picks, dashboard access), communicate with you about your subscription, and improve our service through aggregated analytics.
Legal.privacyThirdContent: We share data with: Stripe (payment processing), Supabase (database and authentication), Vercel (hosting), WhatsApp/Meta (message delivery). Each provider has their own privacy policy.
Legal.privacyRetentionContent: We retain your data while your subscription is active. If you cancel, we delete your personal data within 30 days, except as required by law.
Legal.privacyRightsContent: Depending on your location, you may have the right to: access, correct, or delete your personal data (GDPR — EU), request data portability (LGPD — Brazil), opt out of data sales (CCPA — California), request data deletion (DPDP — India). Contact hola@vectorialdata.com to exercise these rights.
Legal.privacyCookiesContent: We use essential cookies for functionality (authentication, language preferences). We do not use third-party tracking cookies for advertising purposes.
Legal.privacyChildrenContent: Our service is not intended for anyone under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.
Legal.disclaimerIntro: Important information about Vectorial Data's content.
Legal.disclaimerAdviceContent: Vectorial Data provides educational and informational content only. Our stock selections and analysis do NOT constitute personalized investment advice, recommendations, or solicitations to buy or sell securities. Always consult a qualified financial advisor.
Legal.disclaimerPerformanceContent: Past performance does not guarantee future results. Returns shown in our portfolio are based on a hypothetical $50-per-position model and may not reflect actual results. Market conditions change and investments can lose value.
Legal.disclaimerPositionsContent: The author and contributors of Vectorial Data may hold positions in the securities discussed. This may create a conflict of interest.
Legal.disclaimerAccuracyContent: We strive to provide accurate information but do not guarantee data accuracy. Financial data is sourced from Yahoo Finance and other public sources which may contain errors or delays.
Legal.disclaimerRegionalMexico: Mexico: This service does not require registration with the CNBV as it is an educational publishing service, not personalized investment advice.
Legal.disclaimerRegionalIndia: India: This service does not provide SEBI-regulated advisory services. For personalized advice, consult a SEBI-registered investment advisor.
Legal.disclaimerRegionalUK: United Kingdom: This content does not constitute a financial promotion under FCA regulation. It is editorial content from a publication.
Legal.disclaimerRegionalBrazil: Brazil: This service is not registered with the CVM. Content is educational and informational only.
Legal.disclaimerSourcesContent: Financial data is sourced from Yahoo Finance API and public sources. Prices may be delayed. We do not guarantee the accuracy or timeliness of this data.

Lecciones.pageSubtitle: The 5 worst-performing picks in the portfolio. No filters. No edits. Verifiable on-chain.
Lecciones.metaTitle: What we learned by losing | Vectorial Data
Lecciones.metaDescription: The 5 worst-performing picks from our portfolio. Honest analysis, real-time calculation, verifiable on blockchain. No cherry-picking.
Lecciones.lastUpdated: Updated in real time · calculated at {timestamp}
Lecciones.noticeBody: This page shows actual portfolio losses. Past performance does not guarantee future results. This is NOT personalized financial advice.
Lecciones.howWeChoseBody: These are the 5 picks with the lowest return % from the full portfolio, calculated in real time based on the weighted-average cost basis of ALL our buys (including re-buys). The list is NEVER edited by hand. If a pick improves, it automatically drops out. If it gets worse, it automatically enters. The minimum to qualify is at least 30 days since the first buy.
Lecciones.howWeChoseC1: Weighted-average cost basis across all transactions per ticker
Lecciones.howWeChoseC2: Minimum 30 days since the first purchase
Lecciones.howWeChoseC4: Top 5. If fewer than 5 picks are negative, only the existing ones are shown
Lecciones.howWeChoseC5: Updated on every visit. No cherry-picking possible
Lecciones.emptyBody: All our picks with more than 30 days of holding are currently positive. This can change tomorrow — and when it does, this page will automatically show it. It is never edited by hand.
Lecciones.lessonRealtimeNote: Real-time · recomputed with the weighted-average price
Lecciones.pendingContent: Retrospective analysis in progress. The numbers themselves are already verifiable on-chain below.
Lecciones.faq1A: Because any portfolio that only shows wins is editing reality. Honesty about losses is part of the research. If we want our track record to be verifiable, it has to include the bad stuff too.
Lecciones.faq2A: Algorithmically. We take positions with at least 30 days since the first purchase, compute return % using the weighted-average price across all transactions per ticker, and sort worst-first. We take the top 5. No exceptions.
Lecciones.faq3Q: How do I verify it wasn't edited?
Lecciones.faq3A: Every transaction is registered on Base (Ethereum L2) with a unique attestation UID. The source code is on GitHub. Selection is a pure function of the source code and current prices — there is no way to edit the list without breaking the hashes.
Lecciones.faq4Q: How does this work with re-buys?
Lecciones.faq4A: When we have multiple buys of the same ticker, the effective price is the weighted average of all of them. A re-buy at a lower price IMPROVES the average and reduces the loss; a higher one WORSENS it. The calculation updates in real time every time we add a transaction.
Lecciones.faq5A: No. This is editorial and informational content. It is not a recommendation to buy, sell, or hold any security. Always consult a qualified financial adviser before making investment decisions.
Lecciones.contextBody: These 5 picks are one slice of the portfolio. To see all positions (winners and losers) visit the <portfolioLink>full portfolio</portfolioLink>. The full portfolio performance is also available in real time and is also verifiable.
Lecciones.ukBannerBody: This page may constitute a financial promotion under FCA Section 21 of FSMA 2000. The content has not been approved by an FCA-authorized person. Investing carries risk. Consult an FCA-authorized adviser before making investment decisions.
Lecciones.disclosuresF1: This page is educational content, not personalized financial advice.
Lecciones.disclosuresF2: Returns are gross: they do not include taxes, fees, or slippage.
Lecciones.disclosuresF3: Returns are computed in real time based on the weighted-average price of all buys.
Lecciones.disclosuresF4: The selection of the 5 picks is algorithmic and deterministic. See methodology.
Lecciones.disclosuresF5: Vectorial Data operates under the Publisher's Exclusion of the Investment Advisers Act of 1940 (Section 202(a)(11)(D)).
Lecciones.disclosuresF6: We are not a broker-dealer, RIA, or custodial. We do not execute trades. We do not custody your assets.
Lecciones.disclosuresF7: For UK residents: this page may constitute a financial promotion under FCA Section 21 of FSMA 2000. Consult an FCA-authorized adviser before making decisions.
Lecciones.perPickFootnote: Past performance does not guarantee future results. Return calculated as (current_price − weighted_avg_buy_price) / weighted_avg_buy_price. See methodology.

Metodologia.pageSubtitle: How we compute returns, select picks, and handle re-buys.
Metodologia.metaDescription: Vectorial Data full methodology: return calculation with weighted-average price, algorithmic pick selection, handling of re-buys and splits.
Metodologia.introBody: This page documents the exact method we use to compute portfolio returns and select the positions that appear on pages like /lecciones. The goal is to let anyone (human or AI agent) audit our track record without having to take our word for it.
Metodologia.positionSizeBody: Every position is modelled as a $50 USD investment. We buy fractional shares, so the share count is $50 / buy_price. This does NOT represent real investment amounts — it is a fixed hypothetical position size so we can compare picks consistently without position size skewing returns.
Metodologia.returnCalcBody: The return of a single position is: return_pct = ((current_price − weighted_avg_price) / weighted_avg_price) × 100. Current prices come from the latest daily snapshot in our database, which in turn fetches Yahoo Finance on every market day.
Metodologia.weightedAvgBody: When we have multiple buys of the same ticker, the effective price is the weighted average. In our model each transaction invests the same hypothetical $50, so share-weighted average is equivalent to: avg_price = sum($50) / sum($50/price_i). A re-buy at a lower price improves the average and reduces the loss; a higher one worsens it.
Metodologia.weightedAvgExample: Example: If we buy XYZ at $100 and then at $50, each $50 tranche buys 0.5 + 1 = 1.5 shares. The average price is $100 / 1.5 ≈ $66.67. If the current price is $60, the return is (60 − 66.67) / 66.67 ≈ −10%, not −40%.
Metodologia.selectionBody: The list on /lecciones is generated by a pure algorithm that operates on the same return calculation. The algorithm CANNOT be edited by hand — any change requires modifying the public source code.
Metodologia.selectionStep1: 1. Group all transactions by ticker and compute weighted-average price
Metodologia.selectionStep2: 2. Compute return % using the current price from the most recent snapshot
Metodologia.selectionStep3: 3. Filter positions with at least 30 days since the FIRST buy (to avoid short-term noise)
Metodologia.selectionStep5: 5. Sort ASC by return_pct (worst first). Tiebreak: oldest first buy date
Metodologia.selectionStep6: 6. Take the first 5. If fewer than 5 are negative, only the existing ones are shown
Metodologia.splitsBody: We automatically detect splits by comparing historical price with current price. If the ratio indicates a split (e.g. 2:1, 3:1), we retroactively adjust the buy price so that shares and returns reflect post-split reality. The detector lives in `src/lib/split-detection.ts`.
Metodologia.cacheBody: Prices are updated on every open market day (Mon-Fri except holidays) at 4:30 PM ET via a cron job that fetches quotes from Yahoo Finance and writes a snapshot to Supabase. Public pages that depend on this data are cached for ~5 minutes with stale-while-revalidate.
Metodologia.assumptionsBody: Our calculations are GROSS. They exclude: taxes on dividends and capital gains, broker commissions, execution slippage, and FX differences for non-USD stocks. Real-world returns for an individual investor will always be lower than the ones shown.
Metodologia.limitsBody: Our model assumes instant execution at closing price, perfect reinvestment of dividends (not currently modelled), and availability of fractional shares (not always possible at all brokers). These simplifications are standard in most backtests but matter when comparing with real account performance.
Metodologia.auditTitle: 10. How to audit all of this
Metodologia.auditBody: All code is public. The calculations live in `src/lib/position-utils.ts` (aggregatePositions) and `src/lib/lessons.ts` (selectLessons). Transactions live in `src/data/stocks.ts` and each one has an on-chain attestation UID. If you find a bug in the calculation or methodology, open an issue on GitHub or email hola@vectorialdata.com.

Disclosures.pageSubtitle: Conflicts of interest, compensation, risk warnings and compliance information.
Disclosures.metaDescription: Full Vectorial Data disclosures: conflicts of interest, compensation, author positions, methodology and regulatory compliance.
Disclosures.conflictBody: Vectorial Data authors may hold personal positions in the securities discussed. Our pick selection may include companies in which one or more authors have positions. We do not accept compensation from companies or asset managers in exchange for favourable coverage.
Disclosures.compensationBody: Vectorial Data's only source of income is direct user subscriptions ($1/month via Stripe, or USDC payments on Base L2 for the API tier). We do not receive placement fees, affiliate commissions, or sponsorships. We have no paid agreements with brokers, exchanges, or issuers.
Disclosures.positionsBody: Assume that Vectorial Data authors may hold positions in ALL stocks that appear in the public portfolio. We do not disclose per pick whether 'we own it' vs 'we only researched it'. This broad disclosure is conservative and designed to remove any ambiguity about conflicts.
Disclosures.riskBody: Investing in stocks carries risk, including the total loss of invested capital. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Markets are volatile and individual companies can lose most or all of their value. See risk page for more details.
Disclosures.methodologyBody: All returns are computed using the weighted-average price, excluding taxes, fees and slippage. The losing pick selection (/lecciones) is purely algorithmic. See full methodology.
Disclosures.perfBody: Our portfolio models $50 per position in fractional shares. This is a hypothetical model designed to compare picks, NOT to represent real investment returns. Real results for a subscriber will depend on their position size, broker, taxes, and timing.
Disclosures.hypoBody: Past performance shown is based on a hypothetical $50-per-pick model and does not represent actual trading. Hypothetical results have inherent limitations: they are prepared with the benefit of hindsight, do not involve financial risk, and cannot account for the impact of emotional, market, or execution factors on real trading decisions.
Disclosures.thirdPartyBody: Prices, fundamentals and reference data come from Yahoo Finance and other public sources. We do not guarantee the accuracy of this data. Any error in third-party data may propagate to our calculations — if you detect one, please report it.
Disclosures.contactBody: For questions about disclosures, compliance or to report errors: hola@vectorialdata.com.

RiskDisclosure.pageSubtitle: Important information about the risks of investing in stocks.
RiskDisclosure.metaDescription: Complete risk disclosure for stock investing. Market risk, issuer-specific risk, FX risk, and Vectorial Data model-specific risks.
RiskDisclosure.warningTitle: ⚠ Read this before using our content
RiskDisclosure.warningBody: Investing in stocks carries substantial risk of capital loss. You may lose part or all of your investment. Do not invest money you cannot afford to lose. Vectorial Data provides educational content — it is not a substitute for personalized financial advice.
RiskDisclosure.generalBody: Stock markets are volatile. Prices can rise or fall sharply due to macroeconomic factors, central bank policy, geopolitical events, pandemics, liquidity crises, and many other factors outside any single issuer's control. Solid diversification reduces but does NOT eliminate this risk.
RiskDisclosure.specificBody: An individual company can suffer fraud, mismanagement, technological disruption, loss of key contracts, litigation, adverse regulation, or bankruptcy. These events can make a stock lose most or all of its value even when the broader market is stable.
RiskDisclosure.currencyBody: Our portfolio includes stocks from multiple regions denominated in their local currency. We report returns in USD. FX moves can amplify or reduce the USD return of a foreign position independently of its performance in the local currency.
RiskDisclosure.liquidityBody: Some stocks we cover are less liquid than mega-cap names. In periods of market stress, order execution can be slower and spreads wider than usual, leading to significant slippage from the quoted price.
RiskDisclosure.modelBody: Our return calculation assumes $50 per position in fractional shares at closing price, with no taxes, fees, or slippage. Your actual result may differ significantly. Additionally, we operate under the Publisher's Exclusion — we are NOT registered advisers and we do not offer personalized advice.
RiskDisclosure.concentrationBody: While the portfolio diversifies at the ticker level, it may be concentrated at the sector, region, or risk-factor level (e.g. interest rate sensitivity). Losses in stress periods can be larger than those of a broad index.
RiskDisclosure.pastPerfBody: Any return we show is historical and guarantees no future result. Avoid extrapolating recent returns forward. Markets change.
RiskDisclosure.taxBody: Returns shown are GROSS. In practice, dividends and capital gains are subject to withholding and taxes that vary by jurisdiction. Consult an accountant for your personal situation.
RiskDisclosure.ctaBody: Before making any investment decision based on Vectorial Data content, consult a qualified financial adviser, make sure you understand the specific risks of the asset, and verify that your personal situation is compatible with the level of risk being taken.

LegalStatus.pageSubtitle: Which exemptions we operate under, and what we are NOT.
LegalStatus.metaDescription: Vectorial Data's legal status: Publisher's Exclusion under the Investment Advisers Act of 1940, jurisdictions, what we are not, and where we operate.
LegalStatus.summaryBody: Vectorial Data is an editorial publishing service (not an investment adviser). We provide educational and informational content about stocks to a general audience under the Publisher's Exclusion of the U.S. Investment Advisers Act of 1940. We do not provide personalized advice, do not manage capital, and do not custody assets.
LegalStatus.publisherBody: We operate under Section 202(a)(11)(D) of the Investment Advisers Act of 1940, known as the Publisher's Exclusion. It applies to publications of general circulation that: (a) provide impersonal advice, (b) are genuinely in public circulation and available to all, and (c) do not give recommendations tailored to an individual subscriber's situation. Vectorial Data meets all three requirements.
LegalStatus.notWeAre1: We are NOT a Registered Investment Adviser (RIA) with the SEC or any state
LegalStatus.notWeAre2: We are NOT a broker-dealer — we do not execute trades or match buyers and sellers
LegalStatus.notWeAre3: We are NOT a custodian — we have no access to your money or your assets
LegalStatus.notWeAre4: We are NOT a financial adviser — we do not analyze your personal situation
LegalStatus.notWeAre5: We are NOT a portfolio manager — we do not make decisions on your behalf
LegalStatus.notWeAre6: We are NOT registered with CNBV (Mexico), CVM (Brazil), SEBI (India), FCA (UK), FINMA (Switzerland), ASIC (Australia) or any other financial regulator
LegalStatus.jurisdictionsBody: Our content is available globally except in countries subject to OFAC sanctions (Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Syria, Crimea region). In each jurisdiction we apply the specific regulatory disclaimers required, but the base legal framework remains the U.S. Publisher's Exclusion.
LegalStatus.ukBody: We acknowledge that parts of our content, especially the /lecciones page and communications with return figures, may qualify as 'financial promotions' under FCA Section 21 of FSMA 2000. The content has not been approved by an FCA-authorized person. UK residents will see an additional banner with the corresponding warning and should consult an FCA-authorized adviser before acting on any information.
LegalStatus.mxBody: In Mexico we operate as an editorial service. We are not registered as an investment adviser with the CNBV nor as a financial intermediary. Mexican consumers are protected by PROFECO for consumer matters and by CONDUSEF for regulated financial products — Vectorial Data offers none of those products.
LegalStatus.brBody: We are not registered with CVM. Our content is editorial, does not constitute a specific recommendation nor regulated securities analysis services.
LegalStatus.inBody: We are not a Registered Investment Adviser nor a Research Analyst under SEBI. For personalized advice in India, consult a SEBI-registered adviser.
LegalStatus.changesBody: The regulatory environment may change. If a jurisdiction determines that our content requires a specific license we do not have, we will restrict access in that jurisdiction until the issue is resolved. We actively monitor the rules in markets where we have active readers.
LegalStatus.contactBody: If you are a lawyer, regulator or subscriber with a question about our legal status, email hola@vectorialdata.com.

Developers.heroDesc: REST API, MCP Server, and verifiable track record. Your agent gets daily stock picks, fundamental research, and portfolio data — all structured for machine consumption.
Developers.step1Label: 1. Register for a free API key
Developers.proPayNote: Pay with USDC on Base L2
Developers.x402Desc: No API key needed. No registration. No subscription. Your AI agent pays USDC on Base per request and gets pro-tier data instantly. The payment IS the authentication.
Developers.x402Step1: server responds HTTP 402 with payment instructions
Developers.x402Step2: Agent pays USDC on Base to the address in the 402 response
Developers.x402Step3: Agent retries with payment proof in
Developers.x402Step4: Server verifies via Coinbase facilitator — delivers pro-tier data. Agent only charged if successful.
Developers.paymentStep1: Send 5 USDC on Base L2 to our wallet address
Developers.paymentStep3: Call POST /api/v1/payments/verify with your API key and tx_hash
Developers.paymentStep4: Your key is instantly upgraded to Pro for 30 days
Developers.intRestDesc: Standard HTTP endpoints with JSON responses. Works with any language.

Developers.verifyDesc: Every pick is part of a SHA-256 hash chain committed to git. Agents can verify that no picks were edited retroactively.
Developers.verifyAlgorithm: Algorithm: SHA-256(ticker|price|date|previous_hash) — each pick chains to the previous
